goal: Suit meaning pages (e.g. /tarot-card-meanings/major) broken on mobile — hero shoved right and clipped (IMG_4903)
root_cause: `.page-suit .suit-hero` is display:grid; the <=900px rule set grid-template-columns:1fr (=minmax(auto,1fr)). A grid item's min-content (a long unbreakable line) forced the single track to ~434px — wider than the container — so the hero content was pushed right by the cumulative padding and clipped past the viewport. Secondary: chips inherited white-space:nowrap, so the long 'Core themes' value overflowed its full-width pill on mobile.
fix: grid-template-columns uses minmax(0, …) (desktop minmax(0,2fr) minmax(0,1fr); <=900px minmax(0,1fr)) so tracks can shrink below min-content and content wraps; added white-space:normal to the <=640px full-width .chip rule.
verified: chrome harness on local edited CSS @ ~500px: suit-hero column 434px->322px, hero maxRight 523->411 (< viewport), scrollWidth==clientWidth (no overflow), Core themes chip wraps to 2 lines. Fix is shared CSS → covers all 5 suits + TH. md5 parity canonical=www=ios.
